---
title: "Data Exploration"
---

# Exploratory Data Analysis Experience

## Flight Delays Project
**Exploratory Data Analysis (EDA):** Calculated the proportion of delays caused by weather, carriers, and security. Identified the worst airports for weather delays and determined the best month to fly to avoid delays overall.

## Housing Data Project
**Feature Engineering & Interpretation:** Extracted feature importances to determine the strongest predictors of a home's age (living area, 1-story architectural style, and number of bathrooms). Plotted these relationships using boxplots and scatter plots.
